payload.prompt_override: Create a COMPREHENSIVE backlink generation strategy for AgenticMarketingPro. Include: 1) 4-tier link building strategy (Digital PR, link-worthy assets, relationship building, community links), 2) Link building KPIs and targets (15 new DR 50+ links/month, DR 50 by month 12), 3) Digital PR campaign ideas (4 campaigns/quarter), 4) Free tool launch plan (2 tools/quarter for link attraction), 5) Guest post strategy (4 posts/month), 6) Podcast appearance strategy (20/year), 7) Outreach email templates for each tier. Context: We need authoritative backlinks to compete with Jasper, SurferSEO, HubSpot.
